DG-LZ-MON.name: dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group
DG-LZ-MON.description: dynamic group for security functions execution, required for Logging Analytics

DG-LZ-MON-CREDENTIAL.name: dg-lz-mon-credential-dynamic-group
DG-LZ-MON-CREDENTIAL.description: Dynamic group for certificate authority resource principals used by Observability agent credential operations.

PCY-MON-SERVICES.name: pcy-mon-services
PCY-MON-SERVICES.description: Policy to allow usage of Observability services in tenancy.
statements: Allow service operations-insights to use ons-topics in tenancy
Allow service operations-insights to read secret-family in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to use metrics in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to read loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
Allow service dpd to read secret-family in tenancy

PCY-PLATFORM-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-platform-mon-admin
PCY-PLATFORM-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-platform-mon-admin group users to manage Observability services/resources in tenancy.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to inspect all-resources in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read users in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read compartments in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-platform:cmp-lz-monitoring
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read dbmgmt-work-requests in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage dbmgmt-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to use database-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage metrics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read metrics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read alarms in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage opsi-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage management-dashboard-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read secret-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage secret-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage management-agents in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to inspect ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage management-agent-install-keys in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage management-dashboard in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage management-saved-search in tenancy

PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.name: pcy-mon-dynamic-group
PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.description: Policy to allow the Observability management agent dynamic group to upload metrics and logs.
statements: Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to use metrics in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to {LOG_ANALYTICS_LOG_GROUP_UPLOAD_LOGS} in tenancy

PCY-MON-AGENT-CERTIFICATE-DYNAMIC-GROUP.name: pcy-mon-agent-cert-dynamic-group
PCY-MON-AGENT-CERTIFICATE-DYNAMIC-GROUP.description: Policy to allow Observability management agents and certificate authority resource principals to manage certificate, vault, and key operations.
statements: Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-credential-dynamic-group' to use certificate-authority-delegates in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-credential-dynamic-group' to use vaults in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-credential-dynamic-group' to use keys in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to read certificate-authority-bundle in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to read leaf-certificate-bundle in tenancy

Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to manage certificate-authorities in tenancy where any{request.permission='CERTIFICATE_AUTHORITY_CREATE', request.permission='CERTIFICATE_AUTHORITY_INSPECT', request.permission='CERTIFICATE_AUTHORITY_READ'}

Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to manage leaf-certificates in tenancy where any{request.permission='CERTIFICATE_CREATE', request.permission='CERTIFICATE_INSPECT', request.permission='CERTIFICATE_UPDATE', request.permission='CERTIFICATE_READ'}

Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to manage vaults in tenancy where any{request.permission='VAULT_CREATE', request.permission='VAULT_INSPECT', request.permission='VAULT_READ', request.permission='VAULT_CREATE_KEY', request.permission='VAULT_IMPORT_KEY', request.permission='VAULT_CREATE_SECRET'}
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to manage keys in tenancy where any{request.permission='KEY_CREATE', request.permission='KEY_INSPECT', request.permission='KEY_READ'}
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to use certificate-authority-delegates in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to use key-delegate in tenancy

Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to manage leaf-certificates in tenancy where all{request.permission='CERTIFICATE_DELETE', target.leaf-certificate.name=request.principal.id}

PCY-PLATFORM-MON-SECURITY-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-platform-mon-security-admin
PCY-PLATFORM-MON-SECURITY-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-platform-mon-admin group users to manage platform Observability security resources.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to use vaults in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to use keys in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

PCY-SHARED-EXACC-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-shared-exacc-mon-admin
PCY-SHARED-EXACC-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow monitoring groups to manage ExaDB-C@C observability resources in the shared ExaDB-C@C database compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage dbmgmt-family in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to read dbmgmt-work-requests in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to use database-family in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage opsi-family in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage loganalytics-resources-family in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-platform-mon-admin' to manage management-dashboard-family in compartment cmp-lz-shared-exacc-db
